mapper.sql: lr.id, lr.title, lr.url, lr.status_id, DATE_FORMAT(lr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(lr.last_edited_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastEditedTime, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name ORDER BY t.id SEPARATOR ',') as tag
FROM link_record lr LEFT JOIN link_record_tag lrt ON lr.id = lrt.link_record_id LEFT JOIN tag t ON lrt.tag_id = t.id
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, url, status_id, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(last_edited_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastEditedTime, '' as tag FROM link_record WHERE url_hash = UNHEX(SHA2(#{url}, 256))

SELECT id, title, url, status_id, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(last_edited_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastEditedTime, '' as tag FROM link_record WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO link_record (title, url, url_hash, status_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{url}, UNHEX(SHA2(#{url}, 256)), #{statusId})
